name: Orlando
author: rslurry
description:
Uses 2023 LODES data. Coverage spans from Celebration in the south, Four Corners/Mount Dora in the west, UCF in the east, and Sanford in the north.
Includes demand for MCO and SFB airports; UCF, Full Sail, Rollins, Valencia, and Seminole State universities; Disney Magic Kingdom, Animal Kingdom, EPCOT, Hollywood Studios, Typhoon Lagoon, Blizzard Beach, Disney Springs, Universal Studios, Islands of Adventure, Volcano Bay, Epic Universe, the Kia Center, and Inter & Co Stadium.
